_meta.description: CWE to SOC 2 Trust Service Criteria mapping

CWE-89.name: SQL Injection
CWE-89.requirement: Logical access security over information assets

CWE-78.requirement: Logical access security over information assets

CWE-22.requirement: Logical access security over information assets

CWE-863.requirement: Logical access security and role-based access enforcement

CWE-639.requirement: Logical access security over information assets

CWE-269.name: Improper Privilege Management
CWE-269.requirement: Least privilege and role-based access enforcement

CWE-798.name: Use of Hard-coded Credentials
CWE-798.requirement: Logical access security over information assets

CWE-613.name: Insufficient Session Expiration
CWE-613.requirement: Logical access security over information assets

CWE-942.requirement: Logical access security and boundary protection

CWE-117.requirement: Monitoring of system components and anomaly detection

CWE-778.name: Insufficient Logging
CWE-778.requirement: Monitoring of system components and anomaly detection

CWE-390.requirement: Monitoring of system components for anomalies

CWE-532.requirement: Monitoring integrity and confidentiality of logged data

CWE-209.name: Generation of Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
CWE-209.requirement: Monitoring of system components for information leakage

CWE-829.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
CWE-829.requirement: Authorization and management of infrastructure and software changes

CWE-494.requirement: Authorization and management of infrastructure and software changes

CWE-1104.name: Use of Unmaintained Third-Party Components
CWE-1104.requirement: Authorization and management of infrastructure and software changes

CWE-502.name: Deserialization of Untrusted Data
CWE-502.requirement: Change management controls and processing integrity

CWE-918.name: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
CWE-918.requirement: Risk mitigation through system design and controls

CWE-79.requirement: Risk mitigation through system design and controls

CWE-770.name: Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling
CWE-770.requirement: Risk mitigation and system availability controls

CWE-400.name: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
CWE-400.requirement: Risk mitigation and system availability controls

CWE-312.name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information
CWE-312.requirement: Confidentiality of information designated as confidential

CWE-311.requirement: Confidentiality of information designated as confidential

CWE-200.name: Exposure of Sensitive Information to Unauthorized Actor
CWE-200.requirement: Confidentiality of information designated as confidential

CWE-359.name: Exposure of Private Personal Information
CWE-359.requirement: Confidentiality and disposal of confidential information

CWE-327.name: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm

CWE-352.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
CWE-352.requirement: Risk mitigation through system design and controls

CWE-601.name: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site (Open Redirect)
CWE-601.requirement: Risk mitigation through system design and controls

CWE-20.requirement: System processing is complete, valid, accurate, and timely

CWE-434.requirement: System processing is complete, valid, accurate, and timely
